name: Dynavap - The Armored Cap
summary: By popular demand, The Armored Cap is upon us.
description: By popular demand, The Armored Cap is upon us. This upgrade to your dry herb vaping experience contains a Captive Cap encased in a stainless steel shell, capable of fully extracting in 1-2 cycles and keeping your material at temperature for longer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
